title: CimTrak - Example - Scan Compliance By IP
content:
Example on how to run a compliance scan for an agent based on IP address

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cimcor pack (CimTrak-SystemIntegrityAssurance, partner-supported).

Inputs — IP.

Integrations/scripts used: CimTrak.
